name: American Well Corp
business: Amwell is a leading enterprise platform and software company digitally enabling hybrid care. The company provides its clients with core technology and services to develop and distribute digital care programs under their own brands.

exposures.sentence: Amwell is a leading enterprise platform and software company digitally enabling hybrid care.

Amwell Carepoint TM devices enable healthcare providers to leverage proprietary carts and transform existing tablets and TVs into digital access points in clinical settings, helping to address personnel shortages and access limitations.
We have a full, evidence-grade digital forensics system that provides real-time analysis using multiple cloud forensic tools to our cybersecurity team.
We expect to continue to focus on long-term revenue growth through investments in artificial intelligence technology and sales and marketing efforts.

catalysts.event: Transition period end for CCAW joint venture
catalysts.sentence: Certain business activities will continue through the transition period which will end no later than March 31, 2026.
Most of the federal waivers have been extended through December 31, 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Aggregate U.S. market size of subsegments applicable to Amwell's business is approximately $94 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the aggregate market size of the subsegments applicable to our business in the U.S. at approximately $94 billion.

tamClaims.claim: TAM of hybrid care platform is approximately $31 billion and will grow to roughly $50 billion over the next four years.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the TAM of our hybrid care platform is approximately $31 billion and will grow to roughly $50 billion over the next four years.

tamClaims.claim: International market opportunity in behavioral health is estimated to be $23 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The addition of our SilverCloud by Amwell offering significantly expanded our international market opportunity in the behavioral health space, which is estimated to be $23 billion internationally.
